headline: Jefferies says these 4 software stocks screen well in IT exec survey
summary: Investing.com -- Microsoft, Amazon Web Services, Palo Alto Networks and ServiceNow emerged as the strongest performers in a Jefferies survey of 40 IT executives, it was revealed on Friday.
